title: Iron Sepulcher Watch
summary: Investigate the cursed shrine, survive the awakening, and clear the ruins.

victory_conditions.description: Burn every cursed guardian from the sepulcher ruins. Kill what cannot die.
Drive the dead from the shrine. Salt the earth where they stood.

optional_objectives.description: Endure both waves from the depths. Do not flinch when the ground tears open.

defeat_conditions.description: The commander falls — the vigil ends. And the dead keep walking.
Stand your ground. The last soldier alone is not a force — he is a sacrifice.

theme: The dead do not rest here. Neither will you.
